heading: Claims and interests
label: 1111 Claims and interests
notes: legislative statementsA discussion of section 1111(b) of the House amendment is best considered in the context of confirmation and will therefore, be discussed in connection with section 1129.

senate report no. 95–989This section dispenses with the need for every creditor and equity security holder to file a proof of claim or interest in a reorganization case. Usually the debtor’s schedules are accurate enough that they will suffice to determine the claims or interests allowable in the case. Thus, the section specifies that any claim or interest included on the debtor’s schedules is deemed filed under section 501. This does not apply to claims or interests that are scheduled as disputed, contingent, or unliquidated.
amendments: legislative statementsA discussion of section 1111(b) of the House amendment is best considered in the context of confirmation and will therefore, be discussed in connection with section 1129.

children.label: a
children.text: A proof of claim or interest is deemed filed under for any claim or interest that appears in the schedules filed under section 521(a)(1) or 1106(a)(2) of this title, except a claim or interest that is scheduled as disputed, contingent, or unliquidated.section 501 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the class of which such claim is a part elects, by at least two-thirds in amount and more than half in number of allowed claims of such class, application of paragraph (2) of this subsection; or

children.label: ii
children.text: such holder does not have such recourse and such property is sold under or is to be sold under the plan.section 363 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the interest on account of such claims of the holders of such claims in such property is of inconsequential value; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the holder of a claim of such class has recourse against the debtor on account of such claim and such property is sold under or is to be sold under the plan.section 363 of this title
If such an election is made, then notwithstanding , such claim is a secured claim to the extent that such claim is allowed.section 506(a) of this title
